body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Primed, to, cue..

**Primed to cue.** — J Commun Disord. PMID: 32470645. DOI: 10.1016/j.jcomdis.2020.105998. The behavioral effects of lexical priming are well studied in the cognitive sciences. Clinical use of the term and widespread implementation of priming based behavioral interventions has remained limited. This is despite the fact that response-contingent cueing, abehavioral intervention technique used during many cognitive-linguistic interventions, is grounded in theories of priming research.
